prompt: See that switch? Tap switch A!
That's switch A — give it a tap!
feedback: The lamp lights up! You turned switch A on.
Switch A is on — and the lamp glows!

prompt: Now tap switch A again — turn it off.
Can you turn switch A off?
feedback: The lamp went out. Switch off, lamp off!
Off! The switch controls the lamp.

prompt: There's another switch — switch B. What do you think happens when you turn it on?
Switch B is there too — have a try! What will happen?
feedback: Hmm — B is on but the lamp is still out! This gate needs both switches.
B is on... but the lamp still needs A too! This one is picky.

prompt: Now try switch A — what happens with both on?
feedback: Both on — the lamp lights up! This gate needs both switches. It's called an AND gate!
Yes! Both switches on and the lamp is happy. This is an AND gate — it needs both!
